description_long: This object is a lifelike representation of a pigeon, featuring a plump body with a predominantly light gray coloration and darker gray wing bars. The head and neck display iridescent hues of blue and purple, especially around the throat area, giving it a shimmering effect. The eyes are bright orange with a small black pupil, and the beak is short, straight, and dark gray. The legs and feet are pinkish, with three forward-facing toes and one backward-facing toe, each tipped with small claws. The tail is medium-length, straight-edged, and slightly fanned, with darker gray tips. The overall feather pattern is smooth with distinct banding on the wings and tail.
description: A realistic pigeon with iridescent blue and purple neck, gray body, dark wing bars, orange eyes, and pink feet.
description_view_0: Front view showing the iridescent neck, symmetrical wings, orange eyes, and pink feet.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth body, wing bars, and the full profile of the head and beak.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the symmetrical wing and tail patterns, with clear banding and feather arrangement.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the body profile, wing bars, and tail shape.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Smooth gray with dark wing bars, iridescent blue and purple neck, and solid dark tail band
